activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Electrolux Appliances AB
S:t Göransgatan 143
SE-105 45 , STOCKHOLM
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Electrolux Appliances AB
ST. GORANSGATAN 143
105 45 STOCKHOLM
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB, Sweden' is exactly found as invoice issuer 'Electrolux Appliances AB, Sweden' with allowed normalizations applied (case, spacing, common company suffix). Company name and country match exactly. No contradictions found. Rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.1 confirmed match.

consignee.invoice_value:
ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM
MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.
Altunizade mah. Inci cikmazi sok. 3/6

consignee.motivation: Consignee name 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., Türkiye' from certificate is clearly found in invoice buyer field with allowed normalizations (case, spacing, company suffixes). Address and country also match. The invoice like name and address conform with certificate consignee. Land matches exactly after normalization.

goods_description.certificate_value: SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple detailed product descriptions with relevant item numbers matching the certificate description as spare parts for domestic appliances and floorcare consumables and accessories.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description referred to detailed invoice no 60275954 dated 27.02.2026. The invoice lists detailed spare parts and components corresponding to domestic appliances and floorcare consumables. The certificate's express reference to detailed invoice and date allow acceptance of general description per rule 4.3.5. Multiple origins are matched and acknowledged per rule 4.3.7.

quantity.invoice_value: Gross weight 825.331 KGM and Net weight 684.327 KGM (Note: gross in invoice differs from certificate, net matches exactly.)
quantity.motivation: The net weight 684,327 kg exactly matches certificate and invoice after allowed normalizations (decimal separator and spacing). The gross weight differs (certificate 986,000 kg, invoice 825,331 kg). However, net weight is verified and matches, fulfilling minimum one quantity verification per 4.4.3.1. The gross weight discrepancy does not invalidate net weight match, so overall quantity control is MATCH.

origin.certificate_value: Country of origin: Germany, China, Hungary, Türkiye, Italy, Hong Kong, Poland, Slovakia, France, Sweden, Slovenia, Taiwan, United Kingdom, Luxembourg, Romania
origin.invoice_value: Invoice item origin fields include stated countries: Germany, China, Hungary, Türkiye, Italy, Hong Kong, Poland, Slovakia, France, Sweden, Slovenia, Taiwan, United Kingdom, Luxembourg, Romania
origin.motivation: The certificate lists multiple origins which are each explicitly identified in the invoice item origins. EU normalization rules are applied considering 'European Union' in certificate and individual EU member countries in invoice, resulting in acceptance of multiple origins per rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.6. All non-EU origins in certificate appear in invoice as well.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match exactly or within allowed normalization without contradiction. Certificate and invoice are consistent and meet requirements for automatic approval.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan verifieras tydligt mot fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
